name: Leonard
bio:
Descendant of the Shadow Blade Family, Blade of Demon Shadow. Skilled with a dual-edged greatsword, he fights with Light and Dark elements to protect humans.

Role: Physical Seal
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero that deals extra damage to Breakthrough-type enemies and can seal multiple enemies.

skillSlots.name: Dimensional Slash
skillSlots.description: Deals 117% P.DMG to frontline enemies with 20% increased Crit Rate against Assault type Heroes.

skillSlots.name: Shadow Ambush
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy with lowest HP Ratio for 233% P.DMG with 50% probability to apply [Seal].
